name: com.baseprojectpackages.settings
description: A reusable, store-agnostic settings framework for Unity: typed persistable settings (bool, int, float, string, enum) driven by a registry that handles load, save, revert and reset; drop-in components for audio volume, full screen mode, resolution, quality level, VSync and language; and ready-made UI elements (toggle, slider, dropdown and multiple-choice pickers). Backed by PlayerPrefs out of the box, with a swappable store interface for file, cloud or in-memory persistence.
